Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a copy/docs PR. Source inspection confirms the current text being changed and the existing MiniMax web-session auth path it describes.

target.title: Clarify MiniMax web-session login as API-key optional
target.body:
## Summary
This PR improves MiniMax auth UX clarity in CodexBar.

## What Changed
- Updated MiniMax settings copy to explicitly mention browser web-session reuse.
- Changed `API token` label to `API token (optional)`.
- Clarified that leaving API token empty uses web-login session mode.
- Updated `docs/providers.md` to reflect existing browser-login-session support.

## Why
Some users read the current UI as “MiniMax is API-key only.”  
CodexBar already supports MiniMax web-session mode, so this change makes that path easier to discover.

## Scope
- UX/docs copy only.
- No auth/fetch behavior changes.
- DeepSeek remains API-only (official API model).

## Files Changed
- `Sources/CodexBar/Providers/MiniMax/MiniMaxProviderImplementation.swift`
- `docs/providers.md`
target.author: yuxin-qiao
